questions.question: If a symbolic link is encountered during a recursive traversal on a system without the lchown system call, and --no-dereference is in effect, then issue a diagnostic saying neither the symbolic link nor its referent is being changed.

questions.question: On systems that attempt to recursively change the root directory, / .

questions.question: Combining this dereferencing links themselves instead of what they point to.
questions.explanation: Incorrect. Combining this dereferencing option with the --recursive option may create a security risk: During the traversal of the directory tree, an attacker may be able to introduce a symlink to an arbitrary target; when the tool reaches that, the operation will be performed on the target of that symlink, possibly allowing the attacker to escalate privileges.
questions.reason: Approved in final review after source and source_ir_id confirmation.
